title: Deadpool 2
reviews: Funnier than the first installment
Reynolds perfects his antihero charm completely
Action comedy gold done right
Surprisingly heartfelt beneath crude humor
Delivers laughs and emotional punches
Self aware comedy at peak form
Fourth wall breaking reaches new heights
Balances violence with genuine heart perfectly
Meta humor hits every single target
Crude jokes land with surgical precision
Supporting cast elevates every comedic moment
Parody elements work better than expected
Irreverent tone masks deeper emotional themes
Sequel surpasses original in every way
Adult superhero comedy done absolutely right
Witty dialogue keeps you constantly entertained
Action sequences blend perfectly with comedy
Reynolds was born for this role
Subverts superhero tropes with brilliant execution
Left theater wanting immediate third film
